summary: Excellent Miller soundboard capture of an average April ’71 show with standout China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider and Beat It on Down the Line.
review: The recording, taken from a Miller soundboard source, is praised as excellent despite some monitor problems that disrupt continuity in the first set. Musically the concert is regarded as an average ’71 performance (C+ grades), with a few high points – notably a soaring China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider and a superb Beat It on Down the Line – while Bertha falls flat.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is judged average (≈C+), but recording quality is rated excellent; weighted blend yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Miller source described as excellent and crisp, though monitor problems in the first set affect continuity.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
Beat It on Down the Line
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set hampered by monitor issues, second set generally average with a few high‑water marks; overall performance graded around C+.
